things.name: Taktsang Monastery (Tiger's Nest)
things.description: Bhutan's most iconic image - a monastery clinging to a 900m cliff above Paro Valley

things.name: Rinpung Dzong
things.description: 16th-century fortified monastery housing the monk body and district administration

things.name: National Museum of Bhutan
things.description: Inside the 17th-century Ta Dzong watchtower with Bhutan's finest cultural collection

things.name: Kyichu Lhakhang
things.description: 7th-century temple built by King Songtsen Gampo - one of the oldest in Bhutan

things.name: Paro Valley Walk
things.description: Walk through rice fields, apple orchards and traditional farmhouses in the valley

things.name: Dochula Pass & 108 Memorial Chortens
things.description: Mountain pass at 3,100m with 108 chortens and Himalayan panorama to Tibet

things.name: Punakha Dzong
things.description: 17th-century dzong at the confluence of two rivers - Bhutan's most beautiful

things.name: Thimphu Tashichho Dzong
things.description: Bhutan's 13th century capital fortress monastery and seat of the government

things.name: Bhutan International Festival (Tsechu)
things.description: Ancient tantric mask dances performed by monks - dates vary by monastery

things.name: Ema Datshi (Chilli Cheese)
things.description: Bhutan's national dish - whole red and green chillies cooked in fresh yak cheese sauce
